primary_blocker: Offer deadline passed — lead went cold
key_intelligence: R2R lead who abandoned after the offer deadline passed. PATTERN: R2R leads have a 100% loss rate across all closed entries in this KB (022, 025, 027, 032, 035). R2R economics are typically too tight when Stayful's management fee is added on top of rent obligations. Unless the property is demonstrably exceptional, R2R leads are high-effort/low-conversion.
top_objections: Margins too tight once management fee is added to rent costs
lost_reason: Offer deadline passed — lead disengaged. R2R profile with margin risk.
